install.from source: git clone https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw.git && cd zeroclaw && cargo install --path .
install.note: Rust-based agent. Requires Rust toolchain for source builds. After install, run 'zeroclaw onboard' to configure. Verify with: zeroclaw --version

cli.description: ZeroClaw uses cli-oneshot protocol. Each message is a fresh invocation.
cli.note: ZeroClaw does NOT support JSON output mode or session resumption. Output includes ANSI color codes and log lines that must be cleaned.
